name: WorkOS MCP Server
what_it_does: Official WorkOS MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with WorkOS's enterprise auth platform — managing SSO connections, SCIM provisioning, directory sync, and enterprise identity configurations.
use_cases: Managing enterprise SSO connections for B2B SaaS applications via agents
Querying SCIM directory sync status for user provisioning agents
Checking SSO configuration for customer onboarding automation
Managing magic auth links and passkeys for user operations
not_for: Consumer-facing authentication (use Auth0, Clerk for that)
Teams not building B2B SaaS with WorkOS
best_when: An agent needs to manage enterprise SSO, SCIM provisioning, or directory sync for a B2B SaaS application built on WorkOS.
avoid_when: You're not using WorkOS — this is very specific to WorkOS's enterprise auth product.

auth.notes: WorkOS API key via WORKOS_API_KEY. Separate keys for development vs production environments. No scope granularity — key grants full account access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free up to 1M MAU for core features; enterprise SSO has per-connection pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise SSO: $125+/connection/month; SCIM: similar; custom enterprise
pricing.notes: Base auth features free. Enterprise SSO and SCIM are premium. MCP is open source. Competitive in the B2B SaaS enterprise auth space.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits not prominently documented

known_agent_gotchas: Dev vs Prod API keys are different — ensure correct environment key is configured
SSO connections require customer SAML/OIDC IdP setup — cannot be done purely via API
SCIM provisioning requires two-step setup — WorkOS provides SCIM endpoint URL to configure in IdP
Organization IDs must be managed — agents need to track org-to-customer mapping
API key lacks scopes — full account access with single key
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Enterprise security as a product — WorkOS's own security is exemplary. SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001. API key lacks scopes but auth product quality is high.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Enterprise auth product with exemplary security. SOC 2, ISO 27001. API key scope gap is the main weakness.
